title: 「Granted, … However, …」句型
titleEn: Using Granted, … However, … to concede a point before presenting a contrast

source.file: Sentence Structure 82 -「Granted, … However, …」先讓步、後轉折句.pdf

formula: Granted, + complete clause. However, + complete clause.

formulas.formula: Granted, + complete clause. However, + complete clause.

example: Granted, the short-term cost is high. However, the long-term return is stronger.
exampleZh: 誠然，短期成本很高；然而，長遠回報更強。

examples.en: Granted, the short-term cost is high. However, the long-term return is stronger.
examples.zh: 誠然，短期成本很高；然而，長遠回報更強。

examples.en: Granted, the plan is expensive. However, it may save money later.
examples.zh: 誠然，這個計劃很昂貴；然而，日後可能節省金錢。

meaning.zh: 使用 Granted 承認某一點是真實或合理的，再使用 However 提出真正想強調的主要觀點。

rules.zh: Granted 後面通常要使用包含主語和動詞的完整句子。
rules.en: Use a complete clause after Granted.

rules.zh: 使用 Granted 後要加逗號。
第一句結束後要使用句號；第二句以 However, 開始。
rules.en: End the first sentence with a full stop and begin the second sentence with However,.

rules.zh: 第一句承認限制、缺點或相反觀點；第二句通常提出更想強調的主要立場。
rules.en: Put the main message after However.

rules.zh: 使用 Granted 代表承認其中一點合理，並不代表完全同意整個立場。
rules.en: Granted accepts one particular point and does not necessarily mean complete agreement.

rules.zh: 改寫時要保留原句的時態、人物、動作、可能性、確定程度和語意強弱。
rules.en: Preserve the original tense, people, actions, possibility, certainty and degree of meaning.

rules.zh: 每個答案都必須以 Granted 開始，第二句必須以 However 開始；不要改用 although、but、yet 或 nevertheless。
rules.en: Every answer must begin with Granted and its second sentence with However; do not substitute although, but, yet or nevertheless.

benefits.zh: 它能顯示你有考慮事情的兩面，令論述聽起來更全面。
benefits.en: It makes your argument sound balanced.

benefits.zh: However 後面的內容會得到較強的注意，讓讀者清楚知道你的真正立場。
benefits.en: It makes your main opinion clear.

benefits.zh: 它先承認一點，再作出回應，把兩個觀點分成清楚的步驟。
benefits.en: It organises two ideas into clear steps.

benefits.zh: 這個兩句式結構能增加句式變化，避免每次表達轉折都使用 but。
benefits.en: It provides an alternative to repeatedly using but.

benefits.zh: 它讓你先承認合理觀點，再解釋自己的不同結論，令反駁更有禮貌。
benefits.en: It helps you disagree more politely.

benefits.zh: 它可作為現成框架，用於分析利弊、回應相反觀點及評估不同選擇。
benefits.en: It is useful in essays, discussions and presentations.

en: Rewrite each sentence or pair of sentences using Granted, … However, ….
Preserve the original meaning, tense and degree of certainty.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用 Granted, … However, … 改寫以下句子或句子組合。
保留原句的意思、時態和確定程度。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: The bag is cheap, but it is not very strong.
questions.promptZh: 這個袋價格便宜，但不太耐用。
questions.answer: Granted, the bag is cheap. However, it is not very strong.
questions.answerZh: 誠然，這個袋價格便宜；然而，它不太耐用。
questions.highlight: Granted, the bag is cheap. However, it is not very strong.

questions.prompt: Although the room is small, it is comfortable.
questions.promptZh: 雖然房間很小，但很舒適。
questions.answer: Granted, the room is small. However, it is comfortable.
questions.answerZh: 誠然，房間很小；然而，它很舒適。
questions.highlight: Granted, the room is small. However, it is comfortable.

questions.highlight: Granted, Mia is tired. However, she will finish her homework.

questions.answerZh: 誠然，這班巴士行駛得很慢；然而，它很可靠。
questions.highlight: Granted, the bus is slow. However, it is reliable.

questions.answer: Granted, Tom made a mistake. However, he corrected it quickly.

questions.answer: Granted, Leo did not win the race. However, he achieved his best time.

questions.prompt: Admittedly, the plan will cost more at first, but it should save money later.
questions.promptZh: 無可否認，這個計劃最初會花費較多，但日後應能節省金錢。
questions.answer: Granted, the plan will cost more at first. However, it should save money later.

questions.answer: Granted, public transport is sometimes uncomfortable. However, it reduces traffic and pollution.

questions.answer: Granted, the coach was disappointed with the result. However, she praised the players' effort.

questions.answer: Granted, the old building needs repairs. However, it has great historical value.

questions.prompt: The machine cannot replace skilled workers, but it can handle repetitive tasks safely.
questions.promptZh: 這部機器不能取代技術熟練的工人，但可以安全地處理重複性工作。
questions.answer: Granted, the machine cannot replace skilled workers. However, it can handle repetitive tasks safely.

questions.prompt: There is no doubt that the policy limits individual choice. Even so, it protects people from a serious health risk.
questions.promptZh: 毫無疑問，這項政策限制了個人選擇。即使如此，它能保護人們免受嚴重的健康風險。
questions.answer: Granted, the policy limits individual choice. However, it protects people from a serious health risk.
questions.answerZh: 誠然，這項政策限制了個人選擇；然而，它能保護人們免受嚴重的健康風險。
questions.highlight: Granted, the policy limits individual choice. However, it protects people from a serious health risk.

questions.prompt: Some critics point out that smaller classes require more teachers and classrooms. Even so, they can give students more individual attention.
questions.promptZh: 有批評者指出，較小的班級需要更多教師和課室。即使如此，它們能讓學生獲得更多個別關注。
questions.answer: Granted, smaller classes require more teachers and classrooms. However, they can give students more individual attention.
questions.answerZh: 誠然，較小的班級需要更多教師和課室；然而，它們能讓學生獲得更多個別關注。
questions.highlight: Granted, smaller classes require more teachers and classrooms. However, they can give students more individual attention.

questions.prompt: The hospital's new booking system may confuse some patients at first, but it should reduce waiting times once people become familiar with it.
questions.promptZh: 醫院的新預約系統最初可能令部分病人感到困惑，但當人們熟習系統後，它應能縮短輪候時間。
questions.answer: Granted, the hospital's new booking system may confuse some patients at first. However, it should reduce waiting times once people become familiar with it.
questions.answerZh: 誠然，醫院的新預約系統最初可能令部分病人感到困惑；然而，當人們熟習系統後，它應能縮短輪候時間。
questions.highlight: Granted, the hospital's new booking system may confuse some patients at first. However, it should reduce waiting times once people become familiar with it.

questions.prompt: Although stricter recycling rules create extra work for businesses, they can significantly reduce waste sent to landfill.
questions.promptZh: 雖然更嚴格的回收規則會增加商戶的工作量，但能大幅減少送往堆填區的廢物。
questions.answer: Granted, stricter recycling rules create extra work for businesses. However, they can significantly reduce waste sent to landfill.
questions.answerZh: 誠然，更嚴格的回收規則會增加商戶的工作量；然而，它們能大幅減少送往堆填區的廢物。
questions.highlight: Granted, stricter recycling rules create extra work for businesses. However, they can significantly reduce waste sent to landfill.

questions.prompt: Artificial intelligence can produce useful first drafts, yet human judgement is still needed to check facts and context.
questions.promptZh: 人工智能可以製作有用的初稿，但仍需要人類判斷來核實事實和背景。
questions.answer: Granted, artificial intelligence can produce useful first drafts. However, human judgement is still needed to check facts and context.
questions.answerZh: 誠然，人工智能可以製作有用的初稿；然而，仍需要人類判斷來核實事實和背景。
questions.highlight: Granted, artificial intelligence can produce useful first drafts. However, human judgement is still needed to check facts and context.

questions.prompt: It is understandable that raising the minimum wage may increase costs for some employers. Nevertheless, it can improve the living standards of low-paid workers.
questions.promptZh: 可以理解的是，提高最低工資可能會增加部分僱主的成本。儘管如此，這能改善低薪工人的生活水平。
questions.answer: Granted, raising the minimum wage may increase costs for some employers. However, it can improve the living standards of low-paid workers.
questions.answerZh: 誠然，提高最低工資可能會增加部分僱主的成本；然而，這能改善低薪工人的生活水平。
questions.highlight: Granted, raising the minimum wage may increase costs for some employers. However, it can improve the living standards of low-paid workers.

questions.prompt: Tourism certainly brings noise and crowding to popular areas, but it also supports local jobs and small businesses.
questions.promptZh: 旅遊業確實會為熱門地區帶來噪音和擠迫，但亦能支持本地就業和小型企業。
questions.answer: Granted, tourism brings noise and crowding to popular areas. However, it also supports local jobs and small businesses.
questions.answerZh: 誠然，旅遊業會為熱門地區帶來噪音和擠迫；然而，它亦能支持本地就業和小型企業。
questions.highlight: Granted, tourism brings noise and crowding to popular areas. However, it also supports local jobs and small businesses.

questions.prompt: The school cannot solve every problem faced by families. Even so, it can provide early support and connect parents with suitable services.
questions.promptZh: 學校不能解決家庭面對的每一個問題。即使如此，它可以提供早期支援，並協助家長聯絡合適的服務。
questions.answer: Granted, the school cannot solve every problem faced by families. However, it can provide early support and connect parents with suitable services.
questions.answerZh: 誠然，學校不能解決家庭面對的每一個問題；然而，它可以提供早期支援，並協助家長聯絡合適的服務。
questions.highlight: Granted, the school cannot solve every problem faced by families. However, it can provide early support and connect parents with suitable services.

questions.prompt: The research involved only a small number of participants. Still, its findings may guide larger studies.
questions.promptZh: 這項研究只有少量參與者。不過，研究結果仍可能為更大型的研究提供方向。
questions.answer: Granted, the research involved only a small number of participants. However, its findings may guide larger studies.
questions.answerZh: 誠然，這項研究只有少量參與者；然而，研究結果仍可能為更大型的研究提供方向。
questions.highlight: Granted, the research involved only a small number of participants. However, its findings may guide larger studies.

questions.prompt: The proposed transport project will disrupt several neighbourhoods during construction. On the other hand, it could provide faster and cleaner travel for decades.
questions.promptZh: 擬議的交通項目在施工期間會影響多個社區。另一方面，它可能在未來數十年提供更快捷和更環保的交通。
questions.answer: Granted, the proposed transport project will disrupt several neighbourhoods during construction. However, it could provide faster and cleaner travel for decades.
questions.answerZh: 誠然，擬議的交通項目在施工期間會影響多個社區；然而，它可能在未來數十年提供更快捷和更環保的交通。
questions.highlight: Granted, the proposed transport project will disrupt several neighbourhoods during construction. However, it could provide faster and cleaner travel for decades.

questions.prompt: Economic growth does not automatically benefit every citizen. Nevertheless, it gives governments more resources to improve public services when the gains are managed fairly.
questions.promptZh: 經濟增長不會自動令每名市民受惠。儘管如此，如果增長成果得到公平管理，它能為政府提供更多資源來改善公共服務。
questions.answer: Granted, economic growth does not automatically benefit every citizen. However, it gives governments more resources to improve public services when the gains are managed fairly.
questions.answerZh: 誠然，經濟增長不會自動令每名市民受惠；然而，如果增長成果得到公平管理，它能為政府提供更多資源來改善公共服務。
questions.highlight: Granted, economic growth does not automatically benefit every citizen. However, it gives governments more resources to improve public services when the gains are managed fairly.
